title: Malibu Villas — Three-Bedroom Beachside Villa in Plai Laem
blurb: Malibu Villas — an exclusive collection of thirteen contemporary tropical pool villas in Plai Laem, a two-minute walk from the beach. A single proven 3-bedroom, 4-bath layout with a private pool, wrapped in landscaped garden and finished for easy island living.
detail:
Malibu Villas is an intimate collection of thirteen contemporary tropical pool villas set in Plai Laem on Koh Samui's north-east coast — around 150 metres, a two-minute walk, from the beach, in a quiet, leafy neighbourhood with quick access to Chaweng, Bophut and the airport.

Every villa follows one refined, proven layout: three bedrooms and four bathrooms across 153 m² of built-up living space, opening to generous outdoor living. An 8.0 × 3.6 m private pool sits beside a 21.5 m² pavilion, wrapped by landscaped garden and served by a private carport, on plots ranging from 320 to 428 m².

Held on a 30-year leasehold with staged, construction-linked payments, the villas suit both owner-occupiers and investors building a rental-ready asset in one of Samui's most walkable beach neighbourhoods. An optional full furniture package readies the home for guests from day one.
